records.ety: [From Joseph Miller, a comic actor, whose name was attached, after his death, to a popular jest book published in 1739.]

defs: A jest book; a stale jest; a worn-out joke.
quotes: It is an old Joe Miller in whist circles, that there are only two reasons that can justify you in not returning trumps to your partner's lead; i. e., first, sudden illness; secondly, having none.
